display.purpose: Primary tab titles and section headers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #8b5cf6; color: #f8fafc; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7c3aed; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower priority actions like browsing or cancel.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #1e293b; color: #f8fafc; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Glass Panel
components.description: The foundational container for all panels.
components.css: .ds-glass-panel { background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.65); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); color: #f8fafc; }

components.name: Sidebar Tab
components.css: .ds-sidebar-tab { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; color: #94a3b8; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); text-align: left; } .ds-sidebar-tab.ds-active { background: #8b5cf6; color: #f8fafc; } .ds-sidebar-tab:hover:not(.ds-active) { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #f8fafc; }

narrative.overview: The Brain Indexer interface is built to feel like a high-end terminal utility wrapped in a premium desktop experience. It prioritizes the "Zero-Exposure" security principle, using a deep, layered dark mode that suggests a secure, private vault.
keyCharacteristics: Mechanical Density: High-information density that respects user expertise.
Glassmorphism Depth: Subtle blurs and translucent panels to create a sense of layering.
Electric Precision: Vibrant accents used sparingly but forcefully to indicate action and status.

rules.name: The Ten Percent Rule
rules.body: The primary Electric Amethyst accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point; it draws the eye to the most important actions.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Glassmorphism and glows appear only to separate distinct functional layers.

dos: Do use OKLCH for any new color derivations.
Do use monospaced fonts for any system-level feedback or logs.
Do maintain a consistent line length for documentation (65-75ch).
donts: Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards.
Don't use generic SaaS landing-page clichés like 'hero-metric' templates.
Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff).
